hypothesis: Surface rules (NO-specific lede, CMI 4-stage, named staff proof, mandatory proof in every section) generalise to OEM brand/dealer pages — where reader pain is warranty voiding risk (rational/contractual) rather than seasonal deadline pressure (visceral). Evidence: blog 9/10, FAQ 9/10, prose service page 9/10. Hypothesis: same rules score 9/10 on a brand/dealer page explaining OEM authorisation scope and why factory service matters. Tests whether CMI structure works for trust-based/rational reader pain, not just urgency-based pain. No surface changes.
